TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Didier_Burkhalter, title = Didier_Burkhalter, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Didier_Burkhalter} }

S.FORM: Didier Burkhalter I 1960 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Didier Burkhalter, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Switzerland anini i ci Didier Burkhalter, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: …¨~…ģi…¨~…ģi…ôr b~b~vo~u~urkńßa…ĺt…ôr i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i …¨~…ģi…¨~…ģi…ôr b~b~vo~u~urkńßa…ĺt…ôr, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ anini i ¶i …¨~…ģi…¨~…ģi…ôr b~b~vo~u~urkńßa…ĺt…ôr, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Didier Burkhalter I 1960 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Didier Burkhalter, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Switzerland anini i ci Didier Burkhalter, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
